releases.label: EMU Pilot Survey
releases.summary: First pilot observations for EMU at 944 MHz with ASKAP over a 270 deg2 field overlapping the Dark Energy Survey footprint, reaching 25-30 uJy/beam rms at ~11-18 arcsec resolution. The value-added convolved (18 arcsec) catalogue contains 220,102 radio components, of which 178,921 are simple single-component sources. Served through the CSIRO ASKAP Science Data Archive (CASDA) under project code AS101. The EMU main survey began in late 2022 (CASDA project AS201, tile-level Selavy catalogues public); the first curated EMUCAT public data release was anticipated for mid-2025 but no official release announcement was found at seed time.
